description: Style Notefemella caters to every fashionista. This skirt from Femella is perfect for those who love the exotic. Pair it with a solid coloured top, a vibrant scarf and knee high boots. Product DetailsBlack red skirt, has a comfortable fabric waist, and has a zippered closure at the backMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash with similar coloursDo not bleach or dry in direct sunlightUse warm iron if neededSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 26") is wearing a size M
